# Stack Profile
<!-- Auto-generated by /critic-review. Edit to customize. -->

## Tech Stack
Claude Code skills (Markdown), Bash scripts (gh CLI, jq, GraphQL), TypeScript (cheerio parser), Vitest, GitHub API (REST + GraphQL)

## Analysis Scope
- Skill workflow design: state machines, phase transitions, exit conditions
- Shell script correctness: gh API calls, jq parsing, error handling
- Claude Code agent patterns: background agents, sub-agents, tool invocations
- GitHub API integration: REST endpoints, GraphQL mutations, pagination, rate limits
- Prompt engineering: will Claude Code agents reliably follow the skill instructions?

## Best Practices
- Shell scripts must handle GitHub API pagination and rate limiting
- Background agents cannot prompt users interactively — must exit-and-report
- Thread resolution requires GraphQL mutations (not available via gh CLI directly)
- Timestamp filtering on GitHub API uses ISO 8601 UTC format
- Claude Code skills should have clear phase gates to prevent partial execution
- Escalation thresholds should prevent infinite fix loops

## Analysis Format
- `skills/pr-resolution/SKILL.md` — main workflow (5 phases)
- `skills/pr-resolution/bin/*` — bash scripts for GitHub API interaction
- `skills/pr-resolution/lib/*` — TypeScript parsers (cheerio)
- `skills/pr-resolution/references/*` — phase documentation
